name: Voice memo with realtime AssemblyAI streaming transcript
description: Pink mic button → backend WebSocket bridge to AssemblyAI Streaming v3. Browser captures Int16 PCM via AudioContext + ScriptProcessor, streams chunks over /api/voice/stream (Vite proxy → backend voice-stream-controller → AssemblyAI). Interim transcripts appear in the live panel as the user speaks; finalised text fades in chunk-by-chunk. On Stop & send, the final transcript becomes the optimistic user-bubble copy.

persona.name: Diego
persona.context: Truck cab, hands greasy, dictating a quote between job sites.

steps.action: Taps the prominent pink mic button
steps.expect: Composer is replaced by the compact recording panel: 56px gradient orb (pulsing rings), LIVE pill + 0:00 timer, italic placeholder 'Start talking — I'll write it out as you speak.', X cancel + green ⏹ stop. WS to /api/voice/stream opens; AssemblyAI 'Begin' frame received in <2s.

steps.action: Speaks: 'Quote a fence repair for the Patels — three hundred and fifty dollars'
steps.expect: Interim transcript appears italic/dim while speaking; finalised words land in solid teal with a 280ms blur-to-clear fade per chunk; orb scales with audio level; pulse rings ripple outward

Recording panel collapses; user bubble appears with the final transcript as content (no '🎙️ transcribing…' placeholder); MediaRecorder blob still uploads to /files for backend authoritative re-transcription
create_quote action_card with the parsed numbers; total $350.00

evaluationCriteria.check: Orb gradient + glow reads as premium without dominating the chat — fits in the same vertical footprint as the idle composer
First interim transcript word appears within ~400ms of speech; the user doesn't doubt the mic is hot
API key never appears in browser DevTools / Network tab; only the proxy URL ws://host/api/voice/stream is visible
Recording panel is role=region, aria-label='Voice memo recording'; transcript region is aria-live=polite so screen readers track interim text
